title: Lopy's More Materials
description: A Simple Mod that adds Materials for mods/modpacks
body:
# More Materials

A Simple Mod that adds Materials for mods/modpacks


Feel Free to request metal type to add this mod, click [here](https://www.patreon.com/user/membership?u=80130775) if you want to do that!

<sub>"paided btw"</sub>


## Items/Blocks

![Items/Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ChTkZyTh/images/4198b67a5d44b14836f1129e1501e9aafbb8a9e5.png)

(Weapons/Gear/Related stuff for all items an stuff will be a separate mod!)

Q: Are you gonna downgrade it to like 1.16.5 or even below  
A: I'm most likely gonna downgrade it to 1.16.5 but not any other versions below that
